message:
Improve text rendering and input handling

Text system:
- view.rs: Major rendering improvements
- editor.rs: Better cursor handling

Input:
- parser.rs: Enhanced input parsing

Terminal:
- queries.rs: Improved terminal queries
- mod.rs: Refactored module structure

Tests:
- Updated conformance tests
- E2E input/output improvements
- Harness refinements
